query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS proyeccionMensual (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contratoId INT NOT NULL,
  mes DATE NOT NULL,
  montoProyectado DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  rentaNumero INT NOT NULL,
  esUltimaRenta BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  montoReal DECIMAL(15,2),
  facturaId INT,
  generadoEn TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (contratoId) REFERENCES contratos(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (facturaId) REFERENCES facturas(id)
);
